title: The Spirit of the Beehive
posterAlt: The Spirit of the Beehive (1973) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In 1940, in the immediate aftermath of the Spanish Civil War, a young girl living on the Castilian plain is haunted after attending a screening of James Whale's 1931 film Frankenstein and hearing from her sister that the monster is not dead, instead existing as a spirit inhabiting a nearby barn.
synopsis: The Spirit of the Beehive is a 1973 drama and fantasy film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18 certification (ES rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
